mapper.sql: select id, user_id, tg_user_id, award_id, day_str, game_type_code, bonus_money, bet_money, win_money, cal_money, cal_ratio, receive_money, is_receive, sign_time, create_time, sign from t_order_help_money
mapper.insert:
insert into t_order_help_money
user_id, tg_user_id, award_id, day_str, game_type_code, bonus_money, bet_money, win_money, cal_money, cal_ratio, receive_money, is_receive, sign_time, create_time, sign,
#{userId}, #{tgUserId}, #{awardId}, #{dayStr}, #{gameTypeCode}, #{bonusMoney}, #{betMoney}, #{winMoney}, #{calMoney}, #{calRatio}, #{receiveMoney}, #{isReceive}, #{signTime}, #{createTime}, #{sign},
mapper.delete:
delete from t_order_help_money where id in
#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_order_help_money (user_id, tg_user_id, day_str, game_type_code, bet_money, win_money,bonus_money, cal_money, cal_ratio, receive_money, is_receive, sign_time, sign) VALUES (#{userId}, #{tgUserId}, #{dayStr}, #{gameTypeCode}, #{betMoney}, #{winMoney}, #{bonusMoney} , #{calMoney}, #{calRatio}, #{receiveMoney}, #{isReceive}, #{signTime}, TO_BASE64(MD5(CONCAT(MD5(CONCAT( #{userId}, '&', #{tgUserId}, '&', #{dayStr}, '&', #{gameTypeCode}, '&', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM #{betMoney})), '&', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM #{winMoney})), '&', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM #{calMoney})), '&', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM #{calRatio})), '&', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM #{receiveMoney})), '&', #{isReceive}, '&', #{signTime}, #{signSecretKey})), #{signSecretKey})))) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE bet_money = bet_money + #{betMoney}, win_money = win_money + #{winMoney}, bonus_money = bonus_money + #{bonusMoney}, is_receive = #{isReceive}, sign_time = #{signTime}, sign = TO_BASE64(MD5(CONCAT(MD5(CONCAT( #{userId}, '&', #{tgUserId}, '&', #{dayStr}, '&', #{gameTypeCode}, '&', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM #{betMoney})), '&', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM #{winMoney})), '&', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM #{calMoney})), '&', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM #{calRatio})), '&', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM #{receiveMoney})), '&', #{isReceive}, '&', #{signTime}, #{signSecretKey})), #{signSecretKey})))

INSERT INTO t_order_help_money (user_id, tg_user_id, day_str, game_type_code, bet_money, win_money, bonus_money, cal_money, cal_ratio, receive_money, is_receive, sign_time, sign) VALUES (#{userId}, #{tgUserId}, #{dayStr}, #{gameTypeCode}, #{betMoney}, #{winMoney}, #{bonusMoney}, #{calMoney}, #{calRatio}, #{receiveMoney}, #{isReceive}, #{signTime}, TO_BASE64(MD5(CONCAT(MD5(CONCAT( #{userId}, '&', #{tgUserId}, '&', #{dayStr}, '&', #{gameTypeCode}, '&', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM #{betMoney})), '&', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM #{winMoney})), '&', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM #{calMoney})), '&', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM #{calRatio})), '&', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM #{receiveMoney})), '&', #{isReceive}, '&', #{signTime}, #{signSecretKey})), #{signSecretKey})))) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE tg_user_id = #{tgUserId}, bet_money = #{betMoney}, win_money = #{winMoney}, cal_money = #{calMoney}, cal_ratio = #{calRatio}, receive_money = #{receiveMoney}, is_receive = #{isReceive}, award_id = NULL, sign_time = #{signTime}, create_time = NOW(), sign = TO_BASE64(MD5(CONCAT(MD5(CONCAT( #{userId}, '&', #{tgUserId}, '&', #{dayStr}, '&', #{gameTypeCode}, '&', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM #{betMoney})), '&', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM #{winMoney})), '&', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM #{calMoney})), '&', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM #{calRatio})), '&', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM #{receiveMoney})), '&', #{isReceive}, '&', #{signTime}, #{signSecretKey})), #{signSecretKey})))
mapper.select: SELECT user_id as userId, day_str as dayStr, SUM(bonus_money) AS totalBonusMoney, SUM(bet_money) AS totalBetMoney, SUM(win_money) AS totalWinMoney FROM t_order_help_money WHERE day_str = #{dayStr} GROUP BY user_id, day_str
